acceptance_criteria: Submitting the contact form persists a contacts row in the tenant schema.
Tenant isolation: tenant A cannot read tenant B's contacts even with SQL injection.
GDPR delete: when a user account is deleted, their contacts rows are anonymised within 30 days.
Email uniqueness is enforced per tenant.
A Postgres GIN index exists on the contacts.payload JSONB column.

business_requirements.title: Contact form persistence
business_requirements.description: Schema, indexes, and RLS for the contact form on the artist profile page. One row per submission; tenant-scoped; queryable by id, by tenant (paginated), and by email.
